summary: Iteration 87 - Frontend Testing for Wealth Command Navigation Updates. Verified all 3 requested features: 1) Plan group appears BEFORE Investments in clientContextNav, 2) Bonds, Hybrids, and Crypto navigation items added to Investments group, 3) ASSET_HOLDINGS in Client360View includes bonds, hybrids, and crypto categories.

issues: Compliance modal appears on every page visit/reload - consider persisting dismissal in localStorage properly. Session acknowledgement does not persist across page reloads.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation updates verified in iteration 87. To test the client context nav: 1) Switch to Adviser Mode using mode selector, 2) Set selected_client in localStorage or navigate from CRM to select a client, 3) Client context nav will show in sidebar with Plan before Investments and Investments expanded shows Bonds/Hybrids/Crypto items. Compliance modal appears on each page load.
